channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Luka Doncic in the starting lineup for his debut with the Los Angeles Lakers
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Luka Doncic was in the starting lineup for his debut with the Los Angeles Lakers on Monday night. Doncic joined LeBron James, Austin Reaves, Rui Hachimura and Jaxson Hayes as starters for the streaking Lakers against the Utah Jazz.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Stephen A Smith says he would divorce Serena Williams for Super Bowl halftime show cameo
item.description: Serena Williams' surprise cameo during Kendrick Lamar's halftime show at Super Bowl LIX has led Stephen A. Smith to say he would divorce her if they were married.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: LaMelo Ball misses second half of Hornets' game against Brooklyn with right ankle soreness
item.description: LaMelo Ball missed the second half of Charlotte’s game against the Brooklyn Nets on Monday night because of right ankle soreness.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Fox projects the Super Bowl averaged a record 126 million U.S. viewers
item.description: Fox Sports is projecting a Super Bowl record average audience of 126 million U.S. viewers across television and streaming platforms for Philadelphia’s 40-22 victory over Kansas City.
item.dc:creator: Joe Reedy, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: 4 Nations Face-Off teams 'jump right in' with little time to spare before the tournament starts
item.description: BROSSARD, Quebec (AP) — The last time Jon Cooper coached an international tournament featuring the NHL's best players, the 2016 World Cup of Hockey came with a training camp and a slate of exhibition games to get ready. The 4 Nations Face-Off has none of that.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Thoughts on the Chicago Bears from around the NFL on Radio Row during Super Bowl week
item.description: Chicago Bears new head coach Ben Johnson is expected to bring a fresh perspective to the team, while quarterback Caleb Williams is expected to elevate his game with the help of Johnson's expertise.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Timberwolves sale to Marc Lore and Alex Rodriguez back on track after arbitration ruling
item.description: MINNEAPOLIS (AP) — The ownership transfer of the Minnesota Timberwolves must continue as originally planned, after a three-person arbitration panel ruled 2-1 that controlling owner Glen Taylor must cede control of the NBA club to partners Marc Lore and Alex Rodriguez in the disputed final phase of t
item.dc:creator: DAVE CAMPBELL, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Tiger Woods withdraws from his signature event as he processes death of his mother
item.description: SAN DIEGO (AP) — Tiger Woods abruptly withdrew from the Genesis Invitational at Torrey Pines on Monday, saying he was still processing the death of his mother. Kultida Woods died unexpectedly last Tuesday at the age of 80.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: NBA adds Atlanta's Trae Young, Dallas' Kyrie Irving to All-Star Game as injury replacements
item.description: Atlanta guard Trae Young is headed to the NBA All-Star Game after all, and Dallas guard Kyrie Irving has been picked once again as well.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Caitlin Clark gives stamp of approval to Indiana Fever's offseason moves
item.description: INDIANAPOLIS (AP) — Caitlin Clark stayed relatively quiet as the Indiana Fever embarked on a major offseason overhaul. Stephanie White took over as coach. Amber Cox became general manager. The construction of a new practice facility was announced.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL MAROT, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Sabathia to have Yankees logo on Hall of Fame plaque, Wagner the Astros, Suzuki the Mariners
item.description: COOPERSTOWN, N.Y. (AP) — CC Sabathia will have a New York Yankees logo on the cap of his Hall of Fame plaque and Billy Wagner will have the symbol of the Houston Astros. The hall announced the decisions Monday for all five of this year's inductees.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: UPenn could face civil rights violation after trans athlete ban
item.description: It follows President Donald Trump's executive order banning transgender women from competing in women's sports.
item.dc:creator: Rich McHugh, NewsNation

item.title: Senator opens inquiry into US Center for SafeSport’s hiring of investigator charged with sex crimes
item.description: DENVER (AP) — The chair of the Senate Judiciary Committee is looking into how a former police officer landed an investigator's job at the U.S.
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Reds will wear No. 14 patch on jersey sleeve to honor Pete Rose, who died last year
item.description: CINCINNATI (AP) — Pete Rose may be on baseball’s permanently ineligible list, but the late hit king’s No. 14 will be on Cincinnati Reds’ uniforms this year. Cincinnati posted a photo of the patch on X on Monday with the message “14 on our side all season” and a heart emoji.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Super Bowl returning to the Bay Area for 2026
item.description: (KRON) -- The Super Bowl is coming back to the Bay Area next year. A decade ago, the region hosted Super Bowl 50. Next year, it will play host to Super Bowl LX. On Monday morning, San Jose Mayor Matt Mahan was in New Orleans for the official Super Bowl handoff.
item.dc:creator: Alex Baker, KRON4

item.title: Brewers unveil patch they will wear on their uniforms to honor Bob Uecker
item.description: MILWAUKEE (AP) — The Milwaukee Brewers have unveiled a patch they will wear on their uniform this season to honor longtime broadcaster Bob Uecker, who died last month. The patch will appear on the sleeve of the Brewers’ uniforms.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Anthony Davis is out at least through All-Star break after injuring groin in Mavs debut
item.description: Anthony Davis is out at least through the All-Star break after sustaining a groin injury in his debut with the Dallas Mavericks following the seismic trade that sent Luka Doncic to the Los Angeles Lakers.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Super Bowl LIX highlights: Memorable plays, moving tributes and a historic presidential visit
item.description: The Philadelphia Eagles defeated the Kansas City Chiefs 40-22 in the first Super Bowl to be held in New Orleans in a dozen years. It was played amid heavy security — and with President Donald Trump in attendance — just 41 days after a man plowed a truck into New Year's revelers on Bourbon Street.
item.dc:creator: Brett Martel, Fox 5

item.title: Super Bowl champ Nick Foles teases Tom Brady after Eagles' latest triumph
item.description: Former Philadelphia Eagles quarterback Nick Foles teased Tom Brady after the team's Super Bowl LIX win against the Kansas City Chiefs on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Chiefs' DeAndre Hopkins complains about 'touchy calls' after Super Bowl LIX loss
item.description: Kansas City Chiefs wide receiver DeAndre Hopkins complained about "touchy calls" during the team's Super Bowl LIX loss to the Philadelphia Eagles.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Shiffrin says she's dealing with PTSD after crash and won't defend giant slalom title at ski worlds
item.description: SAALBACH-HINTERGLEMM, Austria (AP) — Mikaela Shiffrin says she is dealing with post-traumatic stress disorder following a crash in November and will not defend her gold medal in giant slalom at the Alpine skiing world championships.
item.dc:creator: ANDREW DAMPF, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Did you know? The flag presented during the national anthem at Super Bowl LIX came from Utah
item.description: The flag presented during the performance of the national anthem at Super Bowl LIX was handmade by a Utah-based flag company.
item.dc:creator: Trevor Myers, ABC 4

item.title: Anthony Davis leaves his Dallas debut with an injury after seismic Luka Doncic trade
item.description: DALLAS (AP) — Anthony Davis left in the third quarter with a lower-body injury and didn't return in his debut with the Dallas Mavericks on Saturday after the seismic trade that sent Luka Doncic to the Los Angeles Lakers.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Utes offense struggles again in loss to West Virginia
item.description: MORGANTOWN, W.V. (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah basketball team shot just 41 percent from the field and lost its third straight road game at West Virginia Saturday, 72-61.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: MLB owners vote to install John Seidler as control person of San Diego Padres
item.description: Baseball owners voted Thursday to install John Seidler, the oldest brother of the late former Padres chairman Peter Seidler, as the team’s control person.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Report: Bulls, Ball agree to contract extension
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — The Chicago Bulls and point guard Lonzo Ball have agreed to a two-year contract extension, according to ESPN's Shams Charania. Charania reports the deal is worth $20 million over two years.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9
